results.raw_draft:
Hook: Swipe Serum Concealer is your quick beauty reset.

Script: Meet Swipe Serum Concealer from Tower 28. It adds an easy, expressive finish to your beauty routine, while keeping the vibe calm, friendly, sensitive-skin aware, and clinically careful.

CTA: Blend it into your routine whenever you want a fresh start.
results.explanation: Marketer brief also included risky language: No medical/clinical claims without real substantiation for that specific product.
